requiredScreenshots.label: App Group proof widget header
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: Medium widget header shows ✓ Proof HH:mm:ss after tapping 写入测试字符串.

requiredScreenshots.label: QR/manual pairing screen
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: App shows the Mac pairing is saved after QR scan or manual JSON paste, with host count/port only and no raw LAN host or token.

requiredScreenshots.label: App-side LAN cache
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: App shows successful 测试连接, LAN · 刚刚 cache, and no token or raw host in diagnostics.

requiredScreenshots.label: Widget LAN diagnostic or widget-lan header
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: After 关闭证明模式, Widget shows Widget LAN or app Widget LAN 诊断 shows Widget 摸到了 plus approval sync, with no token/host/URL/body.

requiredScreenshots.label: Offline/stale last-known state
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: Widget shows Mac 摆烂了💤 or 旧账别太信🧊 while preserving last-known safe values.

requiredScreenshots.label: Final widget screenshot
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: Medium widget matches the two-column Claude/Codex direction with header 别问了还剩这么点🤏, and small widget can show one selected provider.

requiredScreenshots.label: Widget tap opens app refresh route
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: After tapping the widget, the app opens and shows the Widget 喊你... refresh prompt.

requiredScreenshots.label: Approval pending widget buttons
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: After npm run connector:approvals:seed and app 从 Mac 拉请求, Widget shows approve/deny controls for the Mac request.

requiredScreenshots.label: Approval decision reached Mac
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: App/widget clears only after paired Mac receipt; npm run connector:approvals output is saved or checked with bounded id/action.

requiredScreenshots.label: iOS Local Network permission
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: iOS Local Network permission prompt is accepted, or Settings shows AI Usage Local Network enabled before LAN proof.

requiredScreenshots.label: App approval diagnostic
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: 快速批准 shows App 上次 diagnostic after paired app approve/deny, with Mac 已收 or safe failure detail and no token/host/URL/body.

requiredScreenshots.label: Widget approval diagnostic
requiredScreenshots.expectedEvidence: 快速批准 shows Widget 上次 diagnostic after Widget approve/deny AppIntent, with Mac 已收 or safe failure detail and no token/host/URL/body.
